case_title: JASON SCUTT VS. EXPEDIA GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA GROUP, INC.
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD 5/23/22. ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO EXPEDIA-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 2/17/22. SC-100 SENT CERTIFIED TO NATIONAL REGISTERED AGENTS-RETURN TO SENDER/VACANT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $871.41 FILED BY SCUTT, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA GROUP, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED FEB-15-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA GROUP, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JASON SCUTT IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT EXPEDIA GROUP, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY SIBEL ABREU, SENIOR PARALEGAL. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
ORDER CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT).
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD 3/16/22 VIA MAIL SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAY-12-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JASON SCUTT IS PRESENT. EXPEDIA GROUP INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM APPEARANCE, REPRESENTED BY SIBEL ABRUE (PARALEGAL). NO FURTHER ZOOM REQUESTS REQUIRED FOR FUTURE HEARINGS FOR THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR MAY-12-2022 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - EXPEDIA GROUP, INC.
